name: Shared Library
description: Frozen Qwen3 backbone loading, trainable connect layer implementations (MLP and GatedResidual), and dataset utilities shared by all phases

name: Phase 0 Model
description: Phase 0 looped LM implementation with fixed n_iter, Phase0Config, and connect layer checkpoint save/load

name: Phase 0 Scripts & Tests
description: Phase 0 training loop (truncated BPTT, curriculum), perplexity eval, text inference, generation comparison, and forward-pass smoke tests

name: Phase 1 — Dynamic Exit Gate
description: Phase 1 model with soft/hard ExitGate for dynamic loop termination, ponder and consistency loss training, and warm-start from Phase 0 checkpoint

name: Phase 2 — Planned Extensions
description: Phase 2 stubs for iteration-aware connect, linear-attention state carry, and LoRA unfreeze — not yet implemented

name: Project Support
description: Project documentation (README, architecture design, Phase 0 experimental report) and Python dependency specification
